config.rememberSort.tooltip: Persist the selected sort mode between menu opens.

mail.wizardLetter: Dear @,^^I have been reflecting on the peculiar spirits inhabiting the old Community Centern.^^While studying these energies, I discovered a simple method to bind a trace of magic to certain objects. With proper enchantment, even something as ordinary as a text sign can act as a focal point for magic currents. Those attuned to it, namely yourself, may traverse between these anchors with relative ease.^^Think of it as a small reward for your assistance in unraveling the junimos' mysteries.^^Use this knowledge wisely.^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard%item object TextSign 1 %%[#]Letter from the Wizard
